matches.pipeline_issue: Heading Structure: {'issue': 'Duplicate H1 and H2 with nearly identical text', 'detail': "Both an H1 ('Welcome to Vision-Aid') and an H2 ('Welcome to Vision-Aid!') exist with essentially the same text, creating redundancy and confusion about the page's primary heading."}
matches.baseline_issue: On home page, 'Primary heading is marked ups with incorrect heading mark-up'.

matches.pipeline_issue: Heading Structure: {'issue': 'Multiple duplicate headings', 'detail': "'Highlights from the last quarter' appears three times as an H2, and 'A Journey of Resilience and Hope: Farhan's Success Story' and 'Vision-Aid's collaboration with Christian Medical College (CMC), Vellore' each appear twice. This makes it impossible for assistive technology users to distinguish between these sections."}
matches.baseline_issue: On home page - 'Sub-sections present under "Why Customers trust Vision-Aid" section are marked up with incorrect heading mark-up'.

matches.pipeline_issue: Heading Structure: {'issue': 'Flat, non-hierarchical structure for content that should be grouped', 'detail': "The page presents a long flat list of H2 headings (success stories, news items, quarterly highlights) without any grouping or parent sections. These items logically belong under categories (e.g., 'Success Stories', 'News & Events', 'Quarterly Updates') but are all siblings at the same level, making the outline overwhelming and hard to navigate."}
matches.baseline_issue: On home page - 'Sub-sections present under "Why Customers trust Vision-Aid" section are marked up with incorrect heading mark-up'.

matches.pipeline_issue: Heading Structure: {'issue': "Heading 'For more details click here' is vague and non-descriptive", 'detail': 'This H2 heading describes an action rather than the content of the section. It provides no meaningful information about what the section contains.'}
matches.baseline_issue: On home page, - 'We facilitate the creation of an inclusive digital ecosystem for persons with disabilities' is marked up as h2 unnecessarily

matches.pipeline_issue: Heading Structure: {'issue': 'Heading used for a call-to-action / instructional text rather than a section label', 'detail': "'Any gift of Smart Assistive Technology will be doubled by a generous matching grant.' and 'Note:- Email is the preferred and recommended way to contact us.' are full sentences used as headings. They function as body content or notes, not as section labels."}
matches.baseline_issue: On home page, - 'We facilitate the creation of an inclusive digital ecosystem for persons with disabilities' is marked up as h2 unnecessarily

matches.pipeline_issue: Heading Structure: {'issue': 'Heading used for promotional paragraph text', 'detail': "'Please contribute to our Smart Phone and Smart Vision program – every donation will be quadrupled via matching grants from other donors! A signle donation will impact 4 lives!' is a lengthy promotional sentence (with a typo) used as an H3 heading. This is body content, not a heading."}
matches.baseline_issue: On home page, - 'We facilitate the creation of an inclusive digital ecosystem for persons with disabilities' is marked up as h2 unnecessarily

matches.pipeline_issue: Heading Structure: {'issue': "Vague heading 'What's New'", 'detail': "While common, this heading is vague in context because the entire page appears to be a stream of news items and updates, making it unclear what specifically falls under 'What's New' versus the many other news-like H2 headings."}
matches.baseline_issue: On home page, - 'We facilitate the creation of an inclusive digital ecosystem for persons with disabilities' is marked up as h2 unnecessarily

matches.pipeline_issue: Heading Structure: {'issue': 'No logical progression or clear content outline', 'detail': 'The heading structure does not form a coherent document outline. It mixes welcome content, news updates, success stories, donation appeals, event promotions, organizational awards, and contact information in a seemingly random order with no clear sectional grouping.'}
matches.baseline_issue: On home page, - 'We facilitate the creation of an inclusive digital ecosystem for persons with disabilities' is marked up as h2 unnecessarily
